title: 3 Productivity Habits That Actually Work
script:
Did you know that most people waste 2 hours every single day?

[Visual: person working at a clean desk with morning sunlight]
Here is the first habit: The Two-Minute Rule. If a task takes less than two minutes, do it immediately. Do not wait. Do not add it to a list. Just do it.

[Visual: calendar with checkmarks and organized schedule]
Second: Time Blocking. Instead of a to-do list, schedule every single task on your calendar. When it is on the calendar, it is non-negotiable.

[Visual: person meditating or taking a deep breath]
And third: The 52-17 Method. Work for 52 minutes, then take a 17-minute break. Your brain needs rest to stay creative.

[Visual: successful person walking confidently]
Start using these three habits today and you will double your productivity by next week.
